body: This is a followup to #199, with some additional fixes for supporting `Dual` numbers in `ClimaAtmos`. Specifically, this PR adds methods for converting a `ThermodynamicState{<:AbstractFloat}` to a `ThermodynamicState{<:Dual}`, and it removes the requirement that the solution tolerance of saturation adjustment must have the same type as the input quantities. It also fixes a typo in the `PhaseDry_ρT` constructor and bumps the minor version number.
title: Add conversion methods and other fixes for Dual numbers
